_comment: PNW mapd binary release pin. The ~20 MB pfeiferj `mapd` binary is intentionally NOT vendored in git (keeps clones and device updates small). system/mapd/installer.py downloads it at launch to `install_path` and verifies `sha256`. To upgrade mapd: change version + url + sha256 + size here (get the sha with `sha256sum mapd`), nothing else.
name: mapd
